HangingProtocol.Name: R US
HangingProtocol.ProtocolComment:
R US - Custom Reece ultrasound hanging protocol. Based on Ultrasound (no auto play), all layouts identical except:
Added Compare Statics/Clips (80% statics) layouts (LayoutIds 5201, 5210, 5212, 5213): - Static image panels open at 80% zoom - Clip panels remain at default 100% zoom - Available for 1, 2, 3, and 4 monitor configurations - Same conditions and priorities as the regular Compare Statics/Clips layouts
Added high-density statics layouts (2-monitor landscape only, Active=false, manual select): LayoutId 42s - "50 Statics" : current exam, 25 per screen (5x5), 21s tile group (requires server-side def) LayoutId 21s - "Compare 25 (Static)" : current+prior, 25 per screen (5x5), 21s tile group (requires server-side def) LayoutId 43s - "48 Statics" : current exam, 24 per screen (6x4), 24s tile group (confirmed working) LayoutId 22s - "Compare 24 (Static)" : current+prior, 24 per screen (6x4), 24s tile group (confirmed working) LayoutId 20s - "40 Statics" : current exam, 20 per screen (5x4), 20s tile group (requires server-side def) LayoutId 24s - "Compare 20 (Static)" : current+prior, 20 per screen (5x4), 20s tile group (requires server-side def) LayoutId 15s - "32 Statics" : current exam, 16 per screen (4x4), 15s tile group (requires server-side def) LayoutId 17s - "Compare 16 (Static)" : current+prior, 16 per screen (4x4), 15s tile group (requires server-side def) LayoutId 16s - "24 Statics" : current exam, 12 per screen (3x4), 12s tile group (confirmed working) LayoutId 18s - "Compare 12 (Static)" : current+prior, 12 per screen (3x4), 12s tile group (confirmed working)
